nodes.context: Term used to refer to Russian organized crime, commonly the Russian mafia; a multiethnic criminal group composed of leaders and senior members of several criminal organizations.
Common term for Russian organized crime, synonymous with Brothers' Circle in the text.

edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers' Circle or Bratski Krug is a term used to refer to Russian organized crime, commonly the Russian mafia.
edges.context: The text equates Brothers' Circle with the Russian mafia.
